name: @stackra/theming
purpose: Unified theming system — color mode, named presets, design tokens, and runtime switching across web and native.
capabilities: Color mode (light / dark / system) with reactive resolve
Named theme presets loaded at runtime
Design token system aligned with HeroUI Pro
React Native binding with Reanimated + AsyncStorage
i18n subpath for locale-aware theme copy
when_to_use: Switching color mode + named theme preset on a HeroUI Pro app with cross-platform state.
when_not_to_use: For the underlying HeroUI theme tokens use @heroui/react useTheme directly; for tenant branding use the backend theme package.
